original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求背景暗色调（可以不是黑色）的女性高级礼盒面板或者放点黑白的玫瑰，主文案居中，主文案：平安顺遂 副文案：白水晶
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry scene, Dark Romantic Luxury style. A classic beaded bracelet composed of perfectly spherical, high-clarity transparent clear quartz beads located in the Center. The beads exhibit strong specular highlights and complex internal refractions. 
[Props]: Elegant monochrome black and white roses softly out of focus in the background, resting on a dark premium velvet gift box surface (texture visible). 
[Background]: Deep charcoal or midnight black atmosphere, moody and expensive, ensuring the white crystal pops. 
Lighting is Dramatic Studio Lighting (Rim Light + Key Light), emphasizing the glass-like transparency and gloss of the beads.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Center-Focused Composition (居中构图).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “平安顺遂”. Position: [Center, overlapping the lower part of the bracelet or floating above]. Style: [Elegant Serif Font, Champagne Gold or Silver Metallic 3D texture, glowing].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “白水晶”. Position: [Directly below Main Title]. Style: [Minimalist Sans-serif, White, spaced out].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “高透净体 · 天然原矿”. Position: [Bottom Center]. Style: [Thin luxury line divider or small translucent capsule].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “甄选礼盒”. Position: [Top Right Corner]. Style: [Gold stamping effect on the dark background].
layout_logic:
This layout uses a 'Center Focus' strategy to maximize the visual impact of the crystal's clarity against the requested dark background. 
1. **Contrast**: The clear/white beads act as the primary light source visually against the dark velvet/rose background, naturally drawing the eye.
2. **Text Placement**: Centering the text '平安顺遂' (Peace & Smoothness) aligns with the circular shape of the bracelet, creating a sense of balance and Zen. Using Gold or Silver text ensures legibility on the dark backdrop.
3. **Atmosphere**: The monochrome roses add the requested feminine/romantic touch without introducing distracting colors that would clash with the pure white crystal.
